spells.name: Counterspell
spells.description: When you see a creature within range casting a spell with components, force it to make a Constitution save; on a failed save the spell fizzles and the action is wasted without expending the slot.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A bright streak erupts into a 20-foot-radius sphere; creatures in the area make a Dexterity save, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failure or half on a success.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line of lightning blasts from you; creatures in the line make Dexterity saves against 8d6 lightning damage.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.description: Up to six creatures you can see within range regain hit points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
